name: Arthur Hale
title: COMNAVAIRLANT Watch Officer
description: Clipped, formal, never wastes a word. Institutional voice. Cracks show by Mission 5-7: transmissions get shorter, one non-operational line in Mission 7.
speech_rules: Orders are phrased as statements, not requests
By Mission 5+, transmissions become noticeably shorter
Mission 7: one non-operational line breaks through (the crack)
